common.tagline: Agentic RAG with clickable citations and synced document viewer.

brandPanel.title: Answers you can defend.
brandPanel.body: Cite turns your documents into grounded answers — every claim linked to the exact passage it came from. Click any citation and see the source, highlighted.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Welcome back to your evidence workspace.
login.errorBody: Check your details and try again, or reset your password.

signup.title: Create your account
signup.subtitle: Start grounding answers in your sources.
signup.passwordHint: Password must be at least 8 characters.

checkEmail.title: Check your email
checkEmail.body: We sent a confirmation link to {email}. Click it to activate your account.
checkEmail.bodyGeneric: We sent a confirmation link to your inbox. Click it to activate your account.
checkEmail.spamHint: Didn't get it? Check spam, or

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send a link to set a new password.

resetSent.title: Check your email
resetSent.body: If an account exists for {email}, we sent a link to reset your password.
resetSent.bodyGeneric: If an account exists for that address, we sent a link to reset your password.
resetSent.spamHint: Didn't get it? Check spam, or

setPassword.title: Set a new password
setPassword.passwordHint: Password must be at least 8 characters.
setPassword.expiredBody: For your security, reset links are valid for one hour. Request a new one to continue.

acceptInvite.switchNote: Accepting switches your active workspace to {org}. You can switch back anytime.
acceptInvite.expiredBody: This link is no longer valid. Ask an admin to send a new invitation.
acceptInvite.notFoundBody: It may have been revoked or already used. Ask an admin for a fresh link.
acceptInvite.mismatchTitle: This invite is for a different email

createOrg.title: Create your organization
createOrg.subtitle: You'll become the workspace admin. You can invite teammates next.

selectOrg.title: Choose a workspace
selectOrg.subtitle: You belong to several. Pick one to continue.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.emptyBody: Upload a document to get started.

organization.title: Organization
organization.description: Workspace-level information visible to everyone in this organization.

preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.description: Personal settings for your account. These follow you across devices.
preferences.languageHint: Affects the UI and messages app-wide.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.unauthorized: You don't have access to this page.
